programme.title: That's My Boy
programme.desc: While Angie's career in commercials goes from strength to strength, Ida fears that her son's marriage is growing weaker. Will Ida be able to stop herself interfering?

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple

Julia McKenzie heads an all-star cast that includes Jim Moir (better known as Vic Reeves), Kimberley Nixon, Fiona Shaw, Robert Glenister, Julia Sawalha, Judy Parfitt and Matt Willis (formerly of pop group Busted)

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Merrick faces a testing time when a terrified hospital patient claims her husband is trying to kill her, but Merton seems reluctant to get involved, while Vernon picks up a bargain all-purpose pest-control solution, enlisting David's help in his eradication mission. Gina's cousin Diane arrives to help her and Phil with the wedding preparations - much to the delight of PC Crane, who is instantly smitten. Rural drama, starring Aislin McGuckin, Tricia Penrose and Mark Jordon

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Sophie and Chris clash over looking after James. Kelly is excited for Tom's return. Zoe tells Chris she is taking over running Home Farm Estates at Frank's request

programme.title: Classic Emmerdale
programme.desc: Zak does not think the thugs will stop harassing Mandy. Chris resents Zoe taking over the business. Vic tells Viv about Terry chatting up Helen Ackroyd

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Curly tries to boost Raquel's confidence. Josie is upset that she and Don are splitting up. Andy visits Steve on their birthday and feels sorry for him in prison

programme.title: Classic Coronation Street
programme.desc: Don feels he is better off without Josie. Vera phones her solicitor to get Terry cut out of her will. Raquel falls out with Curly and tells him she's entitled to her own work

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Newlyweds Mike and Ellie decide to build their dream home at a beauty spot called Gypsy's Acre, ignoring the warnings of elusive romany Mrs Lee about an ancient curse supposedly cast upon the land. The couple settle into their new life, but the mysterious woman makes her presence felt, subjecting them to a campaign of hatred in an attempt to force them out. Tragedy soon strikes, but as luck would have it Miss Marple is staying nearby with her recently widowed old friend Mrs Phillpot. However, if the spinster sleuth is to solve the puzzle, she must put her own life in grave danger. Murder mystery, starring Julia McKenzie, with Wendy Craig, Glynis Barber, Hugh Dennis, Tamzin Outhwaite, Tom Hughes, Joanna Vanderham, Aneurin Barnard, William Hope and Janet Henfrey

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Dr Merrick faces a testing time when a terrified hospital patient claims her husband is trying to kill her, but Merton seems reluctant to get involved, while Vernon picks up a bargain all-purpose pest-control solution, enlisting David's help in his eradication mission. programme.title: Agatha Christie's Poirot

Evidence found in his chemical factory could hold the key to the mystery - but Poirot is unsure if the victim's widow can be trusted. Starring David Suchet, with Ann Bell and Bill Wallis

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Angus, a member of the Bleakridge Watch, a group of villagers who walk the streets reporting anyone who falls foul of the law, is found dead in his meat freezer. Barnaby and Winter meet Angus's devastated sister and her daughter and learn that Angus was investigating a recent spate of burglaries in the village, but had yet to identify the culprit. Angus' post-mortem reveals strange restraining injuries on his wrists and the plot thickens as Barnaby discovers just how far some people will go for power. Frances Barber guest stars as the leader of the Watch

programme.title: Law & Order: UK
programme.desc: Brooks and Devlin investigate a hospital department where three patients have died in suspicious circumstances in six months - the latest being a woman brought into A&E with flu-like symptoms. The detectives learn she died after being given a lethal cocktail of prescription drugs - but with an unsigned patient chart and an extremely busy evening on the ward, tracking down the killer proves challenging. Crime drama, guest starring James Fox, with Bradley Walsh and Jamie Bamber

programme.title: Scott & Bailey
programme.desc: Rachel can't get Gill's remarks about her fling with Will out of her head, so ducks out of attending an awards ceremony with him, fearing their colleagues will believe she's sleeping her way to the top. He finally decides that dating her is too much like hard work and so announces they are no longer an item - a move that leaves Rachel gutted and regretting her behaviour. Janet isn't happy either - it's clear her daughter Elise is about to have her heart broken by Eleanor's son Ade. The duo are soon distracted from their woes by a new case involving the murder of a landlord and his wife who were shot at close range in their pub

programme.title: Inspector Morse
programme.desc: The fatal poisoning of a deaconess who was about to become Oxford's first female chaplain makes Morse wonder whether the city's conservative clerics could be hiding a deadly secret. Further investigation uncovers a connection between the murder and a weight loss clinic. John Thaw stars, with Kevin Whately and Zoe Wanamaker (My Family)

programme.desc: A cowpoke is steering his cattle north to the Canadian border when a corrupt sheriff commandeers the herd. A local saloon-bar owner falls for the hapless cowboy, and with her help he recaptures his cattle. Hooking up with a wagon train, the couple head for the mining town of Dawson, but the thwarted and embittered sheriff is on their tail. Western, with James Stewart, Walter Brennan and Ruth Roman

Neil is considering a move to the area, so Harry takes him and Joe to see a very desirable £5 million penthouse with some of the best views Sandbanks has to offer

programme.title: Harry Redknapp's Sandbanks Summer
programme.desc: Harry Redknapp welcomes celebrity friends to his house in Sandbanks, Britain's most exclusive and expensive seaside resort. programme.title: Caught on Camera
programme.desc: The popularity of dashcams, mobiles and cameras mounted on cyclists' helmets means that many road accidents and near-misses across Britain are now being recorded. This documentary features real-life incidents captured by people at the centre of the action, including the man who could hold the world record for the tightest parallel park, and what happened when a man's runaway tractor crashed into his ex-wife's garden

programme.desc: An American football team's waterboy puts up with constant ridicule from the players. But one day his anger gets the better of him and he demonstrates an unexpected talent for tackling - so the coach gives him a chance to prove his worth on the pitch. However, he has to keep his blossoming sporting career a secret from his overprotective mother. Comedy, with Adam Sandler, Kathy Bates, Henry Winkler and Fairuza Balk

programme.title: The Professionals
programme.desc: CI5 investigates a judge's death and finds a connection with a deadly terrorist group of young middle-class drop-outs that has declared war on the legal system. On catching one of its number, Bodie and Doyle learn of a bomb due to explode in a courthouse. Drama, starring Martin Shaw and Lewis Collins

programme.title: The Sweeney
programme.desc: Regan's informer Popeye is abducted after passing on information about a switch of some stolen diamonds. Working with Carter, the DI must catch the villains while protecting their source. Roy Kinnear guest stars, with John Thaw and Dennis Waterman

programme.title: Lethal Weapon
programme.desc: The LAPD finds itself on the hunt for a thief from a local jewellery heist. Even though the case may look fairly pedestrian from the outset, Riggs and Murtaugh soon get a reminder that all that glitters is not gold and suddenly this straightforward looking case begins to evolve into something deeper. Murtaugh is erroneously called 'grandpa' by another parent while at the playground, sending him into a spiral of insecurity. Riggs battles some serious demons after vowing to withdraw from his drinking habit and work on his sobriety. Clayne Crawford and Damon Wayans star

Things get going in the afternoon during a beatboxing contest, although old tensions resurface at dinner and the hosts are left to calm things down. A massive spread is laid on at breakfast, but when one guest takes issue with the cooked items, Lesley and Chloe worry what impact it will have come payment day

programme.title: 27 Dresses (2008)

Laura Hamilton works within her budget of £100,000 to find a suitable property

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Steve Jones presents action from the sixth round of the season, held at Circuit de Barcelona-Catalunya, where Lewis Hamilton was victorious last year. Red Bull's Max Verstappen took the chequered flag last time out at the 70th Anniversary Grand Prix staged at Silverstone, which was the first time in this campaign a Mercedes driver didn't top the podium. Despite that, the Dutchman is still in second place in the drivers' championship, 30 point behind leader Lewis Hamilton. With David Coulthard and Billy Monger

programme.title: Derren Brown: 20 Years of Mind Control: Live
programme.desc: The illusionist performs his latest psychological trick live, and also revisits some of the most memorable moments of his 20 years of making programmes for Channel 4. He reveals how he has used hypnosis and the power of suggestion to baffle the British public, before opening up about his most controversial, headline-grabbing moments, including playing Russian roulette, 'sticking' viewers to their sofas, and the zombie-fuelled Apocalypse illusion

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: The architect looks back over some of the best projects from the series, including a pair of bunkers from the Second World War in a Surrey garden, and a Victorian railway carriage containing rare mahogany from the 1600s. Also remembered among his favourite past projects are a doghouse in Devon being converted into an extension and an ex-policeman's launch of a cream tea business in a camper van

programme.title: Unreported World
programme.desc: As Donald Trump fights for re-election, his campaign is particularly targeting white women voters. Filmed prior to the coronavirus pandemic and the killing of George Floyd, Karishma Vyas travels to California to meet the 'TradWives', a growing movement of US women who idolise Donald Trump, and have put him at the heart of their anti-feminist, traditional family values as they work to get him re-elected. This is despite the fact that women have often borne the brunt of the President's political and personal barbs

programme.title: River Cottage
programme.desc: Hugh Fearnley-Whittingstall spends a summer living on a vegetarian diet, and shows viewers how to create varied and exciting meals without using meat or fish. He begins by exploring the range of vegetables growing in his own garden at River Cottage, before sampling Asian-inspired recipes created by vegetarian chef David Bailey and taking on the challenge of hosting a meat-free barbecue, with dishes including halloumi, tomato and potato kebabs and chard and samphire tarts

programme.desc: Homer manages to become the owner of the power plant and, in a rare display of intelligence and ingenuity, he celebrates his new-found prestige by sacking former boss Mr Burns - who does not take kindly to being ousted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The proud residents of Springfield are outraged when they learn their town anthem was stolen from a travelling musician, so Bart and Lisa volunteer to find a replacement song. programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Political Slot
programme.desc: MSP Shona Robison sets out the Scottish National Party's vision of building a fairer society

programme.title: Supershoppers
programme.desc: Helen Skelton and Sabrina Grant return with the consumer programme packed with money-saving tips and the secrets of the big brands. In the first edition they show how to save money booking a last-minute staycation, and there is also essential advice on how to protect money if anything goes wrong on a holiday. There are tips on savings on foreign trips for next year, including surprising hacks with the major airlines, and as the travel industry begins to ramp up again, there is advice on reducing carbon footprints

programme.title: Jamie: Keep Cooking Family Favourites
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver demonstrates recipes for simple, affordable and delicious meals, from quick and tasty dinners to useful staples to add to regular repertoires. The chef kicks off by teaming chicken with flavour-packed Cumberland sausages and tasty veggies to creating a one-pan roast dinner, and puts a British twist on the classic spaghetti Bolognese by swapping in pale ale and Cheddar cheese to create an easy, cheap and tasty batch-cook recipe. Plus, he's got a fun take on pasta preparation that the kids - and adults - will love

programme.title: The Yorkshire Jobcentre
programme.desc: When anyone and everyone can come through their door, the dedicated team of no-nonsense job coaches at the busy public employment service always try to go the extra mile for customers, changing lives every day. Gaz, 17, has been referred to the social justice team as he is about to become homeless, while single mum Olivia, 29, has dreams of setting up her own business making ethnically diverse dolls. Also featured is Rose, who has just arrived in Leeds and is new to life on Universal Credit

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary focuses on the demands placed on the women and men who answer people's cries for help. As an ambulance crew answers a call to a heart attack, call handlers guide the victim's daughter through administering CPR. A nine-year-old boy is coached through a terrifying situation when his mother suffers a diabetic emergency while driving, and a father-to-be is instructed how to deliver his baby over the phone

programme.title: Crime and Punishment
programme.desc: Today in Britain, there are more reports of rape than ever before, but conviction rates are at a record low. The return of the Bafta-nominated documentary following the work of police, prosecution and other law professionals focuses on the challenges of investigating this complex and devastating crime. The programme follows two cases as they move through the system, from the perspective of the police and the Crown Prosecution Service as well as the accounts of the alleged victims

programme.title: Lose a Stone in 21 Days with Michael Mosley
programme.desc: The doctor puts five volunteers on a low-calorie diet to help get their health back on track after the UK's Covid-19 lockdown. It is week two of their very low-calorie diet and the volunteers' tempers are beginning to fray, but Michael gets them doing high-intensity work-outs and yoga. He also explores the connection between obesity and inflammation and the role it is thought to have in almost every major disease and illness, and Michael's wife, author Dr Clare Bailey, shares recipes and food tips that help to build and maintain muscle

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Chef Gordon Ramsay heads to the Park's Edge restaurant in Atlanta, Georgia, where a series of spats with the local community are hampering its success. Owners Richard and Jorge's in-fighting has alienated locals, and the duo's suggestion that customer numbers are low because of racism has heightened tensions

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, Gemma and husband Jim serve up a healthy menu that caters for pescatarians as well carnivores. However, Leeann, struggles to enjoy the wholesome fare and on the second night she doesn't seem to enjoy husband Mícheal's takeaway-inspired menu either. Finally, Matt and Paul lay on some dance routines and attempt to raise the bar with hearty portions of restaurant-style cuisine

programme.title: This Is Us
programme.desc: The Pearsons take young Kate to hospital on Christmas Eve when she comes down with appendicitis, and they soon realise that Dr K needs their support. William attends a Narcotics Anonymous meeting, not so much for the meeting itself, but to reconnect with someone from his recent past. Drama, starring Mandy Moore, Milo Ventimiglia and Ron Cephas Jones, and directed by Oscar-winning actress Helen Hunt

programme.title: How to Beat
programme.desc: Kate Quilton and Dr Javid Abdelmoneim continue their health check of the UK, enlisting 10 stressed-out volunteers, ranging from a firefighter and a paramedic to a chef, to find out if simple lifestyle changes can alleviate stress. Is it as simple as cutting back alcohol and caffeine, while taking up hobbies and practising mindfulness meditation? Kate also visits Lego, a company leading the way on employee wellbeing, Javid shows how spending time in green spaces can reduce stress levels, and there's a look at pioneering treatment for people with phobias

Drama series, starring David Threlfall, Jody Latham, Rebecca Atkinson and Gerard Kearns

programme.desc: Housing officers in Harrow receive a tip-off about an overcrowded property and when they arrive they find 10 people living in dire conditions and a house that needs extensive emergency work. programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: Two ministers in Liverpool take over an old church with a plan to turn it into a community centre, only to be obstructed by a group of squatters who refuse to leave. Time to call in eviction expert Chris Sharpe. Council officers Shital and Andrew are on the warpath when a neglectful landlord ignores their warnings about fire safety. Northamptonshire landlord Sina visits her property to ask why payments had stopped, only to be faced by an angry and volatile tenant, leaving her scared to return

programme.title: Nightmare Tenants, Slum Landlords
programme.desc: The documentary about landlord and tenancy issues catches up on some of the stories featured so far. Emmanuel reveals what happened after he returned from a year working abroad to find himself £24,000 in mortgage arrears and unable to get into his own property. Andy made a mistake when he rented out his north London home to someone he knew, only for his so-called friend to sublet the property, pocket the profits and pay Andy nothing. What has happened since?

Claire and her five children will see their weekly budget increase from £171 to a massive £3,000, while Rana is hoping the swap will give her children a taste of her own upbringing in Syria

programme.title: Walking Britain's Lost Railways
programme.desc: Until it closed in 1966 the Deeside Railway followed the River Dee upstream from Aberdeen into what is now the Cairngorms National Park. As luck would have it, Queen Victoria purchased Balmora just as the line was set to open, giving the route prestige. Rob Bell retraces the route, visiting a shooting estate, tossing a caber and finding an unmistakable Highland 'brand' that all owe their existence to this royal railway age. He also explores a quiet valley of cattle farming and timber sawmills, and, in truth, a simple railway that struggled for decades to justify its own existence, despite its royal veneer

programme.desc: Johnny Vegas presents a whistle-stop tour of awkward, embarrassing and cringeworthy holiday moments, as related by a selection of comedians and celebrities. Turning their attention further afield, the stars share some of their most memorable holiday tales, including transforming a hotel corridor into one long 'slip-and-slide', the suspicious discovery of a pair of chicken fillets in a swimming pool in Marbella, and a blush-inducing incident involving a naked paragliding session along a Spanish beachfront

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Property expert Ann Maurice visits the Leicestershire village of Quorn to see a two-bedroom cottage that has been on the market for four months despite its picturesque location. Priorities include making the most of the cramped space by clearing out accumulated clutter and harmonising clashing colour schemes

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Madame Gazelle shows Peppa and her friends how to make a time capsule, so they decide to bury one of their own and dig up an old one which their parents made when they were little. Animated series following the adventures of a little pig called Peppa, her brother George, Mummy Pig, Daddy Pig and their friends and family

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George and Peppa spend the day at the beach, where they have fun playing in the rock pools

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: George and Peppa help Mummy Pig tidy up, and learn about recycling

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Peppa and her family head to the pond to play with their toys

programme.title: Mya Go
programme.desc: The little girl and her friends decide what instruments they want to play in the school band - but Mya realises she would rather sing instead

programme.title: Fireman Sam
programme.desc: Charlie takes Bronwyn and Ben out on his boat. When the vessel capsizes, Charlie gets the chance to show what he is made of

programme.title: Shane the Chef

programme.title: Daisy & Ollie

programme.title: Milkshake! Monkey's Amazing Adventures

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Dr Hamster judges a pet competition at the playground, but choosing the best entry proves difficult

programme.title: Peppa Pig
programme.desc: Mummy Pig tells Daddy Pig to remove a spider from the house

programme.title: Ricky Zoom
programme.desc: When Ricky is busy playing with Dasher and leaving his friends out, the other buddies form a new club with Toot

programme.title: Pirata & Capitano
programme.desc: Determined to beat Pirata to an ancient treasure, Murana lures the melody-minded Weboo away with a fake music competition

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: When an ancient relic goes missing from Carlos's archaeological dig, Tracker and Skye must track down the mysterious creature that may have taken it

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: The pups build a mobility device for Mayor Humdinger, after he pretends to break his toe in order to win a race

programme.title: The Wonderful World of Baby Animals
programme.desc: A look at the life of a sambar deer calf, seeing her first visit to the vet and taking her first steps outside

programme.title: Pets
programme.desc: George lets his owner Rafi brush his thick fur, but when he has had enough of that he decides to go outside. George is very good at hiding, and Rafi and his brother Rico cannot find him anywhere in the garden. The boys and their mother go to a pet shop to buy their beloved feline friend a new collar with a bell, so that next time he runs away they will be able to hear where he is

programme.title: Floogals
programme.desc: The Floogals find themselves unlikely allies with the house cat as they race to escape the vacuum cleaner, but have to investigate when it sucks up some of their precious equipment

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies
programme.desc: The gang finds an orange and has to work out the best way to share it

programme.title: Jeremy Vine
programme.desc: The broadcaster and guests discuss the issues of the day, with co-host Storm Huntley joining him for phone-ins and reading out viewers' correspondence

programme.title: Can't Pay? We'll Take It Away!
programme.desc: Matt and Garry are in Wolverhampton, where a woman who owes £2,000 in parking fines denies knowing the debtor - despite being a relative. But when her mother also gets involved, tempers start to fray. Stewart and Iain confront a woman in Cheshire who is refusing to pay fees to a veterinary practice, claiming her dog has been misdiagnosed, while Paul and Max collect £5,000 owed by a banned company director in east London accused of mis-selling assets on the stock market

programme.title: 5 News at Lunchtime
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Traffic Cops
programme.desc: This edition focuses on North Yorkshire Police targeting crossborder criminals, with a fifth of theft and drug dealing committed by crooks from outside the area. Sergeant Paul is on high alert after a stolen car linked to a recent suspected firearms incident is spotted on his patch, while in Scarborough PC Dan is on the hunt for criminals in a 4x4 who have allegedly been stealing vans - and it is not long before he becomes embroiled in an off-road pursuit.

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: With Jasmine in the authorities' sights, Tori's thoughts turn to her friend's psychological support. Ari resents an intervention from Mackenzie to save the Paratas' home

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Roxy stumbles upon Shane's less-than-legal study strategy. Levi returns to find Sheila treading on eggshells, and Paul tries to show the eco-minded Harlow where he is coming from

programme.title: An Aurora Teagarden Mystery: Reap What You Sew (2018)
programme.desc: The sleuthing librarian is reunited with an old friend, who has returned home to launch an embroidery business. When she turns up dead, Aurora takes it on herself to solve the mystery, and discovers her friend's success had made her a lot of enemies. Mystery, starring Candace Cameron Bure and Jordana Largy

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel's separation begins to cause friction among the pals, who feel they have to choose between the estranged pair - and an impending skiing holiday only makes matters worse. Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe is shocked to discover her half-brother Frank is planning to marry a woman more than twice his age. Chandler tries to stop smoking with the aid of hypnosis, only to suffer strange side-effects, and Monica gets a handy tip that could net her a small fortune

programme.title: 5 News at 5
programme.desc: Round-up of the day's headlines from around the world

programme.title: Neighbours
programme.desc: Roxy stumbles upon Shane's less-than-legal study strategy. Levi returns to find Sheila treading on eggshells, and Paul tries to show the eco-minded Harlow where he is coming from

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: With Jasmine in the authorities' sights, Tori's thoughts turn to her friend's psychological support. Ari resents an intervention from Mackenzie to save the Paratas' home

programme.title: 5 News Tonight
programme.desc: A round-up of the evening's headlines, including coverage of the latest national and international stories

programme.title: Dogs Behaving (Very) Badly
programme.desc: Graeme Hall treats a ridgeback-boxer cross that has become aggressive towards other dogs after being attacked, and helps a cancer patient with a badly behaved golden retriever that is holding back her recovery. His last port of call is to a miniature pincher who objects to any men coming near its owner

programme.title: The Yorkshire Vet
programme.desc: Julian comes to the aid of a cow that is unable to stand up due to a condition called milk fever, caused by calcium deficiency. One false move in the treatment could put the animal's life in danger. Peter works to save the life of a three-week-old kitten with pneumonia. A Chihuahua has a worrying lump that requires surgery, a goose acquires a mating injury from an overenthusiastic partner, and a horse is not going to sit back and allow itself to be castrated

programme.title: Our Yorkshire Farm
programme.desc: The family struggles through two devastating winter storms, during which 100mph winds batter the farm and more than a month's worth of rainfall occurs in the space of just 24 hours. While Clive and Reuben brave the elements to keep the animals fed, Amanda can do nothing to stop the livestock trailer being washed away downstream in a flood. Once the first wave of extreme weather is over, they face a heavy snowfall. On the plus side, this new turn in the conditions gives Miles the chance to practice snowboarding

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Bridget's focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her baby's father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Bridget Jones's Baby (2016)
programme.desc: Bridget's focus on single life and her career is interrupted when she finds herself pregnant, but with one hitch - she can only be 50 per cent sure of the identity of her baby's father after a pair of one-night stands. Is the dad old flame Mark Darcy or US dating guru Jack Qwant? Comedy sequel, starring Renee Zellweger, Colin Firth, Patrick Dempsey, Emma Thompson and Sally Phillips

programme.title: Greatest Ever Movie Blunders
programme.desc: Elis James points out mistakes in movies

programme.title: The 21.co.uk Live Casino Show
programme.desc: Interactive gambling

programme.title: The Nightmare Neighbour Next Door
programme.desc: In the Worcestershire village of Broadway, two families were taken advantage of by a cafe owner to whom they lent £120,000 between them, each unaware that they were not the sole investor. In Bristol, Tim Wrigley ended up being on the receiving end of intimidation and abuse after tiring of his neighbour's increasing demands and bizarre gifts, while a Nottingham mother and son resort to filming their noisy neighbour after months of endless loud music, shouting and personal threats

programme.title: World's Most Pampered Pets
programme.desc: Documentary looking for the animal with the most lavish lifestyle and revealing why some owners spend as much money on their pets as they do on themselves. American reality TV star Aubrey O'Day takes her pampered pooches for an extreme makeover, including purple highlights for one and a pink Mohican for another, while Louise Harris from Essex auditions Britain's best-looking 'diva dogs' for a new fashion line. Also featured are the world's most expensive pet accessories and the sad story of Kalu the chimp - who missed out on an inheritance of £40million when its owner revealed she had lost her entire fortune

programme.title: Wildlife SOS
programme.desc: The work of volunteers treating sick, injured and orphaned animals at a wildlife sanctuary

programme.title: House Busters
programme.desc: Janet Ellis and her team of new-age practitioners suggest ways in which changes to homes could positively affect the lives of their owners

programme.title: House Doctor
programme.desc: Ann Maurice tackles a period property in Bow, in the heart of London's East End, hoping to attract potential buyers by clearing clutter and creating an elegant dining area. Among other improvements, she ditches a navy blue bathroom suite in favour of one in stylish white to ensure the house will fetch the asking price of £300,000

programme.title: Access
programme.desc: Showbiz news and gossip

programme.title: Rango (2011)
programme.desc: A pet chameleon with an active imagination ends up lost in the desert. He makes his way to a lawless town of animals, where he is mistaken for a deadly gunslinger and made sheriff. He organises the townsfolk into a posse when bandits led by an evil rattlesnake steal their supply of water. Oscar-winning animated comedy, with the voices of Johnny Depp, Isla Fisher and Bill Nighy

programme.title: Ice Age: Collision Course (2016)
programme.desc: When a cosmic blunder leaves Earth in the path of an asteroid, it's up to Sid the sloth and pals Manny and Diego to save the day. Animated sequel, with the voices of Ray Romano, Denis Leary, John Leguizamo and Simon Pegg

programme.title: Edward Scissorhands (1990)
programme.desc: A reclusive genius creates a boy but dies before completing him, leaving his brainchild with scissor-like blades in place of hands. A kindly woman from a nearby suburb takes pity on the lonely figure and welcomes him into her home. He quickly becomes a hit in the neighbourhood - but then his new friends start to turn against him. Tim Burton's fantasy, starring Johnny Depp, Winona Ryder, Dianne Wiest and Vincent Price

programme.title: Lemony Snicket's A Series of Unfortunate Events (2004)
programme.desc: Three orphans are entrusted into the care of their sinister uncle, a master of disguise who intends to kill them for the family fortune. Quickly realising he is up to no good, the children flee, moving from one prospective guardian to the next - but their wily relative is never far behind. Comedy adventure based on the children's books, starring Jim Carrey, Meryl Streep, Jude Law, Liam Aitken and Emily Browning, with Kara and Shelby Hoffman

programme.title: The Simpsons Movie (2007)
programme.desc: Homer unwittingly pollutes Lake Springfield, so the US government decides to isolate the city underneath a giant dome. The Simpsons manage to escape and plan to start a new life in Alaska - but learn Springfield is about to be destroyed, and return to save their friends. With the voices of Dan Castellaneta, Julie Kavner, Nancy Cartwright and Yeardley Smith

programme.title: Jason Bourne (2016)
programme.desc: Former government operative Jason Bourne has been in hiding for 12 years after exposing a sinister CIA operation. However, he once again finds himself being hunted down when a former CIA operative gone rogue acquires top secret information - including details of Bourne's own father's involvement in a clandestine scheme. Action thriller, starring Matt Damon, Tommy Lee Jones, Alicia Vikander and Julia Stiles

programme.title: A Most Wanted Man (2014)
programme.desc: An immigrant to Hamburg who has previously suffered torture tries to lay a claim to an inheritance from his father. His story attracts the attention of American and German intelligence agencies, who try to determine his identity as suspicions grow that he is a dangerous extremist. Thriller based on John le Carre's novel, starring Philip Seymour Hoffman, Rachel McAdams and Willem Dafoe

programme.title: Our Idiot Brother (2011)
programme.desc: A naive marijuana grower is released from prison to find his girlfriend has thrown him out of their farm. He turns to his three sisters for help, and as each takes a turn at giving him a place to stay, she finds her stable life thrown into chaos. Comedy, starring Paul Rudd, Elizabeth Banks, Zooey Deschanel and Emily Mortimer

programme.title: Stuart Little (1999)
programme.desc: An American couple decide their son needs a brother, and plan to adopt another child - but when they get to the orphanage they are greeted by a charming talking mouse named Stuart, who fits the bill perfectly. However, their jealous cat hatches a plot to get rid of the new arrival. Comedy adventure, starring Geena Davis and Hugh Laurie, with the voice of Michael J Fox

programme.title: The House of Magic (2013)
programme.desc: A stray cat wanders into a magician's mansion, and finds it is full of strange gadgets. The illusionist allows him to stay, to the annoyance of his other pets, but the cat proves an invaluable addition to the group when their owner's scheming nephew plots to take the house for himself. Animated adventure, with the voices of Murray Blue and Doug Stone

programme.title: Puss in Boots (2011)
programme.desc: The swashbuckling feline joins forces with a cunning thief and a treacherous old friend to steal a magical golden goose from a giant's castle. He must save the day when it transpires that their actions have unleashed a terrible danger on his home town. Animated comedy spin-off from the Shrek movies, with the voices of Antonio Banderas and Salma Hayek

programme.title: Crocodile Dundee (1986)
programme.desc: A New York reporter searches the Australian Outback for a maverick hunter with a legendary reputation, and invites the adventurer back to America. But the die-hard Aussie needs to draw on all his survival skills to adjust to life in the urban jungle. Comedy adventure, written by and starring Paul Hogan, with Linda Kozlowski, John Meillon and Mark Blum

programme.title: Howards End (1992)
programme.desc: A chance encounter during a cruise throws the romantic Schlegel sisters into the paths of the Wilcoxes, an industrious family headed by the well-meaning but strait-laced Henry. When aristocratic matriarch Ruth Wilcox bequeaths her family home to Margaret Schlegel, her children are outraged and dispose of the will, setting the stage for a conflict with tragic consequences. Merchant Ivory period drama, based on EM Forster's novel, starring Emma Thompson, Anthony Hopkins and Helena Bonham Carter

programme.title: The Purge: Election Year (2016)
programme.desc: A US senator is targeted for her anti-Purge agenda, a shop owner is forced to defend his store when his Purge Night insurance becomes unaffordable, and the US economy is boosted by tourists arriving to take part in the annual night of murder and mayhem. Action horror sequel, starring Frank Grillo, Mykelti Williamson and Elizabeth Mitchell

programme.title: A Good Day to Die Hard (2013)
programme.desc: John McClane goes to Russia having received word that his estranged son Jack is in trouble with the law. He is surprised to discover Jack is secretly a CIA agent, and father and son join forces to take on the Russian Mob, who are engaged in a plot to steal nuclear weapons. Action adventure sequel, starring Bruce Willis and Jai Courtney

programme.title: Brick Lane (2007)
programme.desc: A Bangladeshi woman reluctantly leaves her native country for an arranged marriage in England. Years spent living in a drab east-London tower block take their toll, while her husband is consumed by his thwarted ambitions. However, an encounter with a cocky younger man changes her outlook on life. Drama, based on Monica Ali's novel, starring Tannishtha Chatterjee and Satish Kaushik

programme.title: Snoopy and Charlie Brown: The Peanuts Movie (2015)
programme.desc: The long-suffering youngster hopes his lifelong run of bad luck will come to an end when he develops a crush on a new schoolfriend. His beloved dog has more important things to worry about, as he dreams of taking to the skies in his airborne kennel. Animated comedy, with the voices of Noah Schnapp and Bill Melendez

programme.title: A Dog's Purpose (2017)
programme.desc: A dog is reincarnated as different breeds over several generations, with multiple owners and with a variety of names, but he is fated to be reacquainted, decades later, with his original owner. Comedy drama, starring Dennis Quaid, with the voice of Josh Gad

programme.title: The Last Airbender (2010)
programme.desc: A chosen one with mastery of the four elements is charged with keeping the peace between four nations. When he disappears while still a boy, one of these factions sees a chance to gain absolute power and wages war on the others. After 100 years, the chosen one is found and must find a way to restore harmony. Fantasy adventure based on the cartoon series, starring Noah Ringer and Dev Patel

programme.title: Dragonheart (1996)
programme.desc: A knight sets out to slay a dragon, only to find the unhappy creature is the last of its kind. Forging an unlikely alliance, the pair embark on a mission to rid their kingdom of its tyrannical ruler. Fantasy adventure, starring Dennis Quaid, David Thewlis, Pete Postlethwaite and Julie Christie, with the voice of Sean Connery

programme.title: Belle (2013)
programme.desc: The illegitimate mixed-race daughter of a Royal Navy admiral is raised in the household of her great uncle, but is never entirely accepted in Georgian British society. She falls in love with an idealistic lawyer, and together they campaign against the slave trade. Fact-based period drama, starring Gugu Mbatha-Raw, Tom Wilkinson and Emily Watson

programme.title: Red 2 (2013)
programme.desc: Former CIA agent Frank Moses reunites his squad of retired operatives for a vital mission. A devastatingly powerful new weapon has been stolen, and it falls to Frank's team to retrieve it - which means facing lethal assassins, terrorists and corrupt government officials out to steal the device. Action thriller sequel, starring Bruce Willis, Helen Mirren and John Malkovich

programme.title: Disturbia (2007)
programme.desc: A troubled teenager is sentenced to three months under house arrest for attacking a teacher, and passes the time by spying on his neighbours. However, one day he notices something suspicious and becomes convinced one of them is a serial killer. Thriller, starring Shia LaBeouf, Carrie-Anne Moss, David Morse and Sarah Roemer

programme.title: We Are the Best! (2014)
programme.desc: Two rebellious teenage girls growing up in 1980s Stockholm discover punk rock, and are inspired to start their own band, despite the mockery of their classmates. They find an unexpected kindred spirit in a born-again Christian girl, who has the musical talent they need. Drama based on Coco Moodysson's graphic novel, starring Mira Barkhammar, Mira Grosin and Liv LeMoyne. In Swedish

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos, including cats 'singing' the Star Wars theme tune and an escaped honey badger

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits PJ's Steakhouse in Queens, New York, to provide his expert advice to the owners. They decided to turn a successful bar into a high-end restaurant, but without any previous experience in managing a business they have found themselves seriously in debt. With an over-confident chef and a partner propping up the bar, co-owner Madalyn faces a few difficult decisions

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost gives advice to the Dane and Nicole Ostler, who are struggling to control their two rambunctious boys while also still grieving the loss of their first child

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Uncle Marvin reveals he has become a stockbroker and convinces Barry and his friends to invest their money with him. Beverly invites 50 people over for a Thanksgiving 'potluck' dinner instead of cooking for the family

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray insists that a reluctant Adam must have driving lessons, the family learns something new about Pops in the process. Erica's grumpy nature means she has a hard time making friends at college and she turns down an invitation to a toga party, but when Barry visits her for the weekend, he quickly thrives on the college social scene

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam and Barry decide to write a song like the iconic Parents Just Don't Understand. But when they don't get the reaction they expected from Murray, the boys take steps to make amends. Beverly keeps calling Erica at college, but Erica wants some space from her mother and screens her phone calls, forcing Beverly to adopt drastic measure

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Erica tells Beverly she is going to spend the first night of Hanukkah with Geoff and his family, Beverly starts a competition over who hosts the best Hanukkah party. Meanwhile, Barry seeks advice from his grandfather about how to be cool and Pops suggests that he should enter the school's holiday talent show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to relax after he is forced to take a holiday, and when Penny quits her job the duo end up spending time together. Meanwhile, Leonard struggles to be supportive of his girlfriend's career decision, Bernadette seeks Stuart's help in replacing one of Howard's comic books, and Howard and Raj provide Amy with some advice. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: When the guys are unable to get tickets for Comic-Con, Leonard, Howard and Raj decide to buy fake passes from a stranger - but they then worry about getting caught with them. Sheldon decides to hold his own comic-book convention and searches for a suitable star guest for the event. Meanwhile, the girls take tea at a hotel but discover that maturity is over-rated. Comedy, guest starring James Earl Jones and Carrie Fisher

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon and Amy take a train ride to the Napa Valley with Howard and Bernadette on Valentine's Day, while Leonard and Penny head to the vets when they volunteer to look after Raj's dog. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard's purchase of a dining-room table causes Sheldon to re-evaluate his life. Meanwhile, Howard is offered the chance to go back to the International Space Station, and Bernadette struggles to decide whether to encourage him. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Melissa Rauch

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: After arguing with Sheldon, Howard tries to make amends by taking him to Nasa's headquarters in Houston. Elsewhere, Penny has second thoughts about quitting her job as a waitress when her car dies, while Amy tries to find Raj a date. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: In the middle of a nationwide shortage of liquid helium, Sheldon and Leonard take desperate measures to obtain the supplies they need in order to prove a scientific theory before a rival team of researchers can beat them to it. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette download a dating app onto Amy's phone in order to find her a new boyfriend

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: While being interviewed for a documentary about Star Trek character Mr Spock, Sheldon struggles to suppress his emotions about his recent break-up with Amy, leaving Leonard and Penny shocked to discover he had bought her an engagement ring. Howard and Bernadette fall out over plans to renovate his childhood home. Wil Wheaton, Adam Nimoy and Stephen Merchant guest star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny thinks that Leonard is taking her for granted and has stopped making an effort in their relationship, so she decides to go away for a spa weekend with Amy. Howard and Raj go to extreme lengths to deal with a squeaky floorboard in the baby's bedroom

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tests a newly invented device after hearing that it can help him to read people's emotions. Leonard isn't happy when he finds out that Penny's brother is coming to town so that she can help him to find a job. Raj gathers his ex-girlfriends together so that they can give him some dating advice

programme.title: Transformers: Age of Extinction (2014)
programme.desc: The shape-changing robots are driven into hiding when the human race turns against them. When rediscovered by a kindly inventor and his daughter, they come out of exile to save the world, battling a new breed of human-created Transformers. These deadly new machines were created to hunt them down, but are now growing independent and intend to make use of technology from the Transformers' home planet in a plot that could threaten all life on Earth. Fourth film in the sci-fi adventure series, starring Mark Wahlberg, Stanley Tucci and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Dodgeball: A True Underdog Story (2004)
programme.desc: The struggling owner of a run-down gym is forced to take drastic action to prevent an arrogant fitness guru buying the business out from under him - and enlists his customers to form a dodgeball team in the hope of triumphing in the US championships. Sporting comedy, starring Ben Stiller, Vince Vaughn and Christine Taylor

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Australia: Earth's Magical Kingdom, The Chase, Line of Duty, The Brexit Storm: Laura Kuenssberg's Inside Story, Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol, and Celebrity Painting Challenge. Narrated by Craig Cash

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week. The shows under their scrutiny include Our Planet, This Morning, Britain's Got Talent, Line of Duty, Blind Date and 24 Hours in Police Custody. Narrated by Craig Cash

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon receives a nasty surprise when he visits his mother in Houston, while Raj's murder mystery party causes conflict for the rest of the gang members. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj is racked with guilt when he tries to date Lucy and Emily at the same time, Penny has trouble deciding whether to take a role in a film, and Sheldon struggles to choose between two gaming systems. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on shows including Australia: Earth's Magical Kingdom, The Chase, Line of Duty, The Brexit Storm: Laura Kuenssberg's Inside Story, Mission: Impossible - Ghost Protocol, and Celebrity Painting Challenge. Narrated by Craig Cash

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Barry and Adam form a garage rock band and ask Laineyn and Erica to get involved, eventually leading to unexpected consequences. Meanwhile, Charles and Diana's royal wedding has Bev wanting to renew her wedding vows with Murray. Comedy, starring Wendi McLendon-Covey and Jeff Garlin

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Adam accidentally gets Barry kicked out of his cool group of friends, so he comes up with a plan to get his brother back in favour by convincing them he has the hacking skills to access the school's computer system to change their grades. Comedy, starring Sean Giambrone

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gurvinder and Tina kick off the competition in Southampton with a Punjabi feast, before Maggie and Rick turn the clock back 500 years and jokey Marc and Lou cook up a quirky menu

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Nathan loves music as well as his home town of Stoke-on-Trent. So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Fifty-four-year-old John returns to the programme after a year and the experts must find him the perfect match second time around, while Troy's ideal woman is Barbie

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Ryder announces that he plans to join the US Navy, but Mel and Joe are unconvinced that he is prepared for military life, and come up with a plan to make him change his mind. Their plot involves Joe pretending to support the youngster's decision by giving him a taste of what to expect during his training, but instead devising a fiendish mock boot camp intended to persuade him the life of a serviceman is not for him. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joe Lawrence

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta and Boyle investigate a serial killer who poses a severe danger to the public. Captain Holt continues to spar with his rival, Commissioner Kelly. Jeffords must deal with some complications resulting from his recent news about his lieutenant's exam

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates' agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Joe puts all his thought into a birthday gift for Mel - so when she ends up not liking it, she does her best to please him by pretending she is happy with it. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel organises a family game night, pitting herself and Joe against Lennox and Zander, but the competition leads to a trip down memory lane when they reminisce about the past. Comedy, starring Melissa Joan Hart and Joey Lawrence

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Murray takes Erica's car privileges away, she and Barry buy a shabby second-hand van to get back at him. Meanwhile, when Adam objects to being voted 'nicest guy' in the school yearbook, he gets a suspension

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Inspired by the film Ferris Bueller's Day Off, Barry pretends to be ill so that he can avoid school and create an epic day of his own. However, his plans go awry when Adam has exactly the same idea. Charlie Sheen guest stars

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Jake and his father deal with unsettled family business. Amy and Rosa work a high-profile case. Terry wants to join the NYPD band

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The squad members partner up for their next Halloween Heist - unaware they have to be handcuffed to each other. But that is just the start of their problems

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: The youngster starts an internet flame war, and Missy stands up to the boys on her baseball team. Elsewhere, Meemaw is unhappy when George Sr spends time with her new boyfriend

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldon's old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny's father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howard's girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: First Dates

Property developer Daniel, 40, returns to the restaurant after his nerves got the better of him on the previous occasion. Will Rae fall for his nervous charm, or will it be another disaster?

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part one of two. Adam offers to remove the chip from Spike's brain in return for his help in isolating Buffy from her friends. Angel comes to Sunnydale looking for Buffy, but gets drawn into a showdown with Riley

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: Part two of two. Buffy and her friends realise Spike has been manipulating them. They reunite to stop Adam's final scheme to flood the Initiative base with demons and create an army of cyborg creatures like himself - with a mentally controlled Riley set to become one of them. Buffy realises she is not powerful enough to face her enemy alone - but a mysterious spell could give her the edge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny tries to help Sheldon when he starts to wonder whether he is wasting his time studying string theory. Meanwhile, during a dinner, Raj discovers Howard once embarrassed himself on a date with Emily. Stephen Hawking guest stars

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny and Leonard try to distract Sheldon from his career woes by reinstating Anything Can Happen Thursday, but it causes friction among the gang when Amy and Bernadette are caught lying. programme.title: Gogglebox

programme.title: Supernanny US
programme.desc: Jo Frost offers advice to the Garcias, with stay-at-home dad Anthony struggling to understand his new role as primary caregiver and Bethanie unable to find a work/life balance

So, when bride-to-be Beccie gives him free rein to plan their wedding, he decides to honour them - and not her - with nuptials based on the rare grooves of Northern Soul. Will this groom be able to deliver a swinging day, or will his bride be swinging wildly at him?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Gurvinder and Tina kick off the competition in Southampton with a Punjabi feast, before Maggie and Rick turn the clock back 500 years and jokey Marc and Lou cook up a quirky menu

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Pops is evicted after accidentally starting a fire in his flat during a Halloween party. Beverly invites him to move into the family home, but soon his wild lifestyle proves too much for them to handle. Comedy, starring George Segal

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Mr Meller singles out Adam during dodgeball, Beverly intervenes and gets him fired. programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: Young Sheldon

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howard's new robotic arm creates problems

programme.title: Melissa & Joey
programme.desc: Mel launches a healthy diet campaign while running for a Senate seat, but a voter soon catches her out eating some unhealthy fast food. When the man tweets a photo of her gorging on a burger and calls her a hypocrite, she gets into a war of words with him

programme.title: Melissa & Joey

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Holt asks for Jake's help in a case that is exceptionally meaningful to him. Charles and Terry work together on a side business

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: The entire squad is on high alert when a massive blackout hits Brooklyn. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg as a detective with a light-hearted approach to crime

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Mary gets Pastor Jeff involved when Sheldon is not invited to Billy's birthday party, while George Sr has male-bonding time with Dr Sturgis

programme.title: Young Sheldon
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to fake an illness to avoid a swimming test at school. Meanwhile, Dr Sturgis attempts to spy on Meemaw's new boyfriend. Comedy, starring Iain Armitage

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Penny's former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

Comedy sequel, with Ben Stiller, Robert De Niro, Owen Wilson and Dustin Hoffman

programme.title: Buffy the Vampire Slayer
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the battle with Adam, Buffy, Willow, Xander and Giles experience the same vivid and disturbing dream which reveals their fears and doubts and offers hints of what the future may hold. Xander falls under the mental control of the hypnotic count, while Riley feels threatened by the power Dracula has over Buffy. programme.desc: The gang's preparations for Star Wars Day are interrupted by the news that Professor Proton has died. Leonard and Penny attend the funeral, where they talk about their rejected marriage proposals, but Sheldon has difficulty dealing with the death of his childhood hero - until a surprise visitor helps him cope with his grief. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco, with a guest appearance by Bob Newhart

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: Gogglebox

Narrated by Craig Cash. First shown in April 2019

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Helicopter pilot Paul, 59, is embarking on his first-ever date dressed in women's clothing and hopes that 51-year-old Sydney can see that underneath he is 'just a normal bloke', while make-up artist and mother-of-five Bianca, 31, sits down for a meal with white van man and fellow single parent Daniel

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Gavin attempts to pull off a Thai-themed wedding in Somerset, while his fiancee Sophie dreams of a rustic, romantic affair

programme.title: Teleshopping

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: A selection of the team's favourite investigations. Kate Quilton visits Haagen-Dazs to find out why some vanilla ice-creams are more expensive than others, while Helen Lawal heads to Tanzania to see the lengths vanilla farmers go to in the production of the natural flavouring. Matt Tebbutt travels to the Netherlands to explore the myth that Edam was once used as emergency cannon balls and Jimmy Doherty learns about an innovative solution to the problem of shellfish feeding on discarded plastic in the sea

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Brighton to secretly restore a 1984 Audi UR Quattro, which has been under a tarpaulin on a drive for 10 years. Owner Barry has dreamed of working on the vehicle, but health issues have left him sapped of energy and unable to fulfil his wish

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend fix up a historic racing car, an Austin Healey Sprite, which has been kept in a garage since 1968. The challenge is to restore the car so that Sir Stirling Moss, who raced in the vehicle at Sebring in the USA in 1962, can get back behind the wheel

programme.title: Car S.O.S.
programme.desc: Presenter Tim Shaw and master mechanic Fuzz Townshend head to Northumberland to restore a real 'barn find'; a 1934 Morgan F4 three-wheeler, which has been stored in a shed for more than 50 years. The vehicle was one of the most successful lightweight cars from the early days of motoring

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Health-conscious grandmother Tina Ainsworth hosts the first dinner party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, putting on a Chinese-themed evening for her guests - croupier Tomasz Wisniewski, PR consultant Julia Smith, copy writer Rachel Imms and DJ Gareth Harding

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Croupier Tomasz Wisniewski hosts the second dinner party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire. His 'outrageous'-themed evening leaves plenty of scope for his guests' imaginations, but his balloon-pumping competition brings out the competitive streak in one contestant

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: DJ Gareth Harding hosts the third dinner party from Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, where he provides an Ibiza-themed night after he transforms his garden into a Balearic cocktail bar and club complete with lasers and disco lights. The guests seem impressed with the host's sophisticated menu, but he may have bitten off more than he can chew as he attempts to cook a tricky beef Wellington

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Animal lover Rachel Imms hosts the fourth party of the week from Mansfield. She opts for a French-themed evening, but her complicated main course proves to be a challenge, and her accordionist entertainer does not appeal to everyone in the way she had hoped

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Dance fanatic Julia Smith hosts the final party in Mansfield, Nottinghamshire, and is confident she will wow fellow competitors with her fancy house and hospitality, having roped in two waiters to give the evening a touch of class. A spot of salsa dancing proves entertaining for all the wrong reasons, and as the event draws to a close, the contestants gather to discover which dinner was rated the best

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at Trecarne House in Liskeard, Cornwall, where owners Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan hope to demonstrate that their B&B offers the best value for money. The pair win the group's admiration by sharing their life story, but one guest stirs up intrigue by holding his cards close to his chest

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The owners spend their second night of the competition at the Magna Carta at Windsor in Berkshire, a five-star floating bed and breakfast run by Captain Dominic Read. The guests are pleasantly surprised upon arrival, but not all are impressed by the standard of the accommodation - and a cracked teapot at the breakfast table leads to trouble for the proprietor

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third B&B of the week is Ash Cottage near Leeds Castle in Kent, where the unusual decor is an eye-opener for the guests but is not everyone's cup of tea. Trish and Tom get heated over the instant coffee before owners Rayne and Chris Deal take their fellow contestants to Chatham Dockyard to try their hands at rope-making

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final guest house of the week is A Room with a View in Brighton, where owner Stephen Bull and housekeeper Joanna Harris hope their nine-room establishment will impress the contestants. Things get off to a good start when Rayne and Chris Deal are impressed by the cleanliness of the property, but things take a turn for the worse when breakfast gets the thumbs down

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The B&B owners come together to confront their critics face-to-face. Hosts of Trecarne House in Cornwall Trish and Tom Brock-Morgan raise issues with Magna Carta's Dominic Read on his mark for their hosting, while he has a bone to pick with them over criticism of his five-star floating B&B. Stephen and Joanna of A Room with a View in Brighton receive complaints about their breakfast, and tensions run high as the payments are revealed and the winner is announced

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Straight-talking Janice hosts the first party in Cheltenham, but the success of her evening is under threat when conversation turns to the medical history of a guest's dog. Things then proceed to get even worse as the host serves an under-prepared pavlova

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Lady-of-the-manor Vanessa hosts the second party in Cheltenham, but asks her diners to wear slippers to protect the floors of her country home. It proves to be an unhappy evening for sole male contestant Alex when he gets more dessert than he bargained for

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Sole male contestant Alex hosts the third party in Cheltenham and is confident of impressing his three dinner guests, but the evening turns sour when Vanessa and Janice almost come to blows

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Final host Cathy welcomes her fellow diners into her home for the last party in Cheltenham, but she faces the tough task of reuniting a feuding group before the winner of the £1,000 prize is announced

programme.title: D-Day: The King Who Fooled Hitler
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the role played by George VI in maintaining the secrecy of the plans for the D-Day Landings, and how the royal family regained the trust of British intelligence, following concerns about Edward VIII's reputation as a Nazi sympathiser. The programme also examines how the Queen Mother preserved one of the greatest secrets of the Second World War

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a man is having his third seizure of the day. He's in a semi-conscious state and needs to get to hospital urgently, but the two paramedics in attendance need back-up

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes with the Devon and Cornwall police force, showing the critical decisions that the communications and control centre team makes each day. The first edition covers the Easter bank holidays, and incident manager Adele must decide which jobs to prioritise, with only limited resources at her disposal. The weekend begins with a violent arrest, which uses up all of Paignton's available response officers, while the only dedicated traffic officer is called to an accident in Exmouth

programme.title: 999: What's Your Emergency?
programme.desc: The documentary follows paramedics as they deal with people who have mental health problems. Maria Stanley is called to a multi-storey car park, where she tries to talk a man away from the edge, while Kirsten Harper and Amy Siddall race to help a father who is having suicidal thoughts. In London, crews attend the scene of a failed suicide attempt that has left a middle-aged man trapped under a train

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: Scaffolder Thomas arrives at London's King's College Hospital after suffering a head injury at a building site and doctors are concerned he may have fractured his skull, back or neck. Hilton, 85, has diabetes and is worried about his swollen legs, and retired architect Edgar is struggling to breathe following an asthma attack. Meanwhile, in the waiting room, two women make friends and swap stories and jokes

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Birmingham, a man is having his third seizure of the day. He's in a semi-conscious state and needs to get to hospital urgently, but the two paramedics in attendance need back-up

programme.title: Call the Cops
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes with the Devon and Cornwall police force, showing the critical decisions that the communications and control centre team makes each day. The first edition covers the Easter bank holidays, and incident manager Adele must decide which jobs to prioritise, with only limited resources at her disposal. The weekend begins with a violent arrest, which uses up all of Paignton's available response officers, while the only dedicated traffic officer is called to an accident in Exmouth

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests' home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star

programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp visits the Chagford Show, Devon, where she enters her home-made elderflower cordial in the garden crafts competition

programme.title: A Place in the Sun: Home or Away
